question: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for wholesale purchases?

children.text: Our standard MOQ starts at $750 per order. You can mix products to reach MOQ as long as the selected items are in stock.

question: How quickly are wholesale orders processed?

children.text: Most wholesale orders are reviewed and processed within 24 to 48 hours on business days after payment confirmation.

question: How do I place a wholesale order request?

children.text: Browse products, add preferred items to your cart, and submit the wholesale request form. Our team reviews inventory and sends your invoice and next steps.

question: Can I mix and match products in one order?

children.text: Yes. You can combine brands, flavors, and categories in a single wholesale order as long as the final total meets MOQ requirements.

question: Which shipping carriers do you use for US orders?

children.text: Carrier options are selected based on destination, compliance requirements, and service availability. Tracking details are shared after dispatch.

question: How long does delivery usually take after dispatch?

children.text: Delivery windows vary by region, but most domestic shipments arrive within 2 to 7 business days after dispatch.

question: Do you offer a discount for crypto payments?

children.text: Yes. Eligible wholesale invoices paid in supported cryptocurrencies can receive up to a 10% discount, depending on current terms.

question: What payment methods do you accept for wholesale invoices?

children.text: We support crypto and selected traditional payment options based on account and order profile. Final payment options are shown on your invoice.

question: Are your products authentic and quality checked?

children.text: We source from verified suppliers and keep quality controls in place so retailers can stock with confidence and reduce return risk.

question: How do I know if an out-of-stock item will be restocked?

children.text: You can submit the product in your request notes. Our team will provide current availability status and expected restock timing where available.

question: Do you enforce 21+ age and business compliance requirements?

children.text: Yes. We enforce adult-use policies and follow applicable wholesale compliance requirements for age-restricted product categories.

question: How is PACT Act compliance handled for orders?

children.text: Shipping and fulfillment workflows are configured to align with relevant reporting and carrier requirements under applicable regulations.
